articles.title: Exonerated Chelsea man is suing for $1 million after 34 years in prison
articles.description:
Rosa is suing for the maximum $1 million allowed under state law, a cap which some exonerees are calling on state lawmakers to raise.

The post Exonerated Chelsea man is suing for $1 million after 34 years in prison appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Exonerated Chelsea man Rosa is suing for $1 million after 34 years in prison.
Rosa's lawsuit highlights the $1 million cap on compensation for exonerees in Massachusetts.
Local advocates are urging lawmakers to increase compensation limits for wrongfully convicted individuals.

articles.title: Ranking the Patriots’ 2026 schedule from least to most exciting games
articles.description:
The Patriots will have several primetime matchups this season against teams like the Seahawks, Chargers, and Chiefs.

The post Ranking the Patriots’ 2026 schedule from least to most exciting games appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Patriots will face Seahawks, Chargers, and Chiefs in primetime games during the 2026 season.
Fans can expect thrilling matchups, enhancing local excitement for the team's performance.
Increased viewership and attendance may boost local businesses around game days.

articles.title: Vermonters will vote on equal protection amendment to state constitution this fall
articles.description:
The proposal is aimed at ensuring all people are treated equally under the law regardless of their race, ethnicity, sex, religion, disability, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, or nationality.

The post Vermonters will vote on equal protection amendment to state constitution this fall appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Vermonters will vote on an equal protection amendment this fall.
The amendment aims to protect rights regardless of race, gender, or sexual orientation.
Boston residents may see increased advocacy for similar protections in Massachusetts.

articles.title: Lakeville police investigating pipe bomb found near town pond
articles.description:
A resident found the PVC pipe bomb near Egger Bog Pond off of Highland Road, according to Lakeville police.

The post Lakeville police investigating pipe bomb found near town pond appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Lakeville police are investigating a PVC pipe bomb found near Egger Bog Pond.
The bomb was discovered by a resident off Highland Road.
Residents are urged to stay vigilant and report suspicious items.

articles.title: Mass. McDonald’s employee to face criminal charges after viral video shows alleged food contamination
articles.description:
The employee was seen in a video stuffing french fries into her mouth before putting them into one of the chain’s fry containers. 

The post Mass. McDonald’s employee to face criminal charges after viral video shows alleged food contamination appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: McDonald's employee filmed contaminating fries faces criminal charges in Massachusetts.
Video shows employee eating fries before placing them in containers, sparking health concerns.
Local residents worry about food safety at Boston-area McDonald's locations following incident.
